# Nouns Colombia — Nadiecito, Resident Artist

> Portfolio and documentation site for Nouns Colombia, a Latin American node of
> the Nouns DAO ecosystem. This page focuses on the artist residency program and
> its first resident: Nadiecito, pixel artist and cultural organizer from Cali, Colombia.

## About Nouns Colombia

Nouns Colombia is a community bringing nounish culture to Colombia through graphic art
fairs, collaborative murals, IRL events, and a DAO-funded artist residency program.
The project is backed by Nouns DAO (Ethereum-based decentralized autonomous organization
that funds public goods and creative projects globally).

The community model: direct DAO funding, full creative freedom, local cultural roots.
Activities include pixel art, onchain trait creation, Farcaster community building,
IRL meetups, and participation in the broader Nouns ecosystem.

## Artist in Residence: Nadiecito

- **Full handle:** Nadiecito (@nadiecito.eth on Farcaster, @Ningunartista on X)
- **Location:** Cali, Colombia
- **Disciplines:** Pixel art, illustration, animation, cultural organizing
- **Residency period:** August 2024 – March 2025
- **Funded by:** Nouns DAO Prop #840 (https://www.nouns.camp/proposals/840)

### Key works and contributions
- Hundreds of pieces across illustration, pixel art, and animation — including 100+ pixel animations for the NOC (Noun O'Clock) Farcaster channel, self-described as "almost daily, barely animated pieces"
- Noundry trait submissions: onchain Nouns traits created and published
- Feria Gráfica Nounish: IRL graphic art fair in Cali, Colombia, bringing local artists into the Nouns ecosystem
- Mural Amarillo: collaborative community mural project
- Active participant in Nouns subcommunities: Vrbs, Lil Nouns, Nouns Amigos, Nouncil, Yellow Collective, Based Nouns
- Participated in Nouns Rounds and Flows (illustration/animation contests on Farcaster)

## Site Sections

- **Community (#who):** Who Nouns Colombia is, the residency program model, what the DAO funds
- **Gallery (#work):** Pixel art and animation work by Nadiecito
- **Chronicle (#chronicle):** Detailed timeline of the residency — month-by-month account of contributions, projects, and community activity
- **Feria (#feria):** Documentation of the Feria Gráfica Nounish art fair in Cali
- **Mural (#mural):** Documentation of the Mural Amarillo collaborative mural
- **Proposal (#proposal):** Summary and link to the original Nouns DAO proposal (Prop #840)
